commit.message:
Move frozen-camera abort to TrafficBot base class

Add consecutiveDuplicates >= 10 check to TrafficBot.shouldAbort() so all
bots abort on mid-session freezes without needing per-bot changes.
Connecticut, Kentucky, and any other image bot all benefit automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: ClassicTraffic
repository.description: Posts videos of state traffic cameras 🚗

commit.message:
chore: add .claude/ to .gitignore

Agent worktrees and memory files should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Kentucky: abort on mid-session camera freeze

Track consecutiveDuplicates in TrafficBot's image loop. Previously
shouldAbort() only caught cameras frozen from the start (uniqueImageCount=1),
but cameras that served 1-2 unique images then froze would run for hundreds
of duplicate images (hours of wasted time). Now abort after 10 consecutive
duplicates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Python path in batch files to bypass Windows Store alias

Task Scheduler couldn't find Python via the 'python' shortcut due to
Windows App Execution Alias redirecting to the Microsoft Store.
Updated both batch files to use the full Python 3.14 executable path.

Add Contact Us form, fix pricing CTAs, and swap footer logo on all API app pages

- Add dedicated Contact Us popup form (FAQ section) with First Name, Last Name,
  Company, Work Email, Mobile, Country, Message fields. Submits to APIANT webhook
  with reCAPTCHA validation. Uses explicit reCAPTCHA rendering to avoid conflicts
  with qualification flow widget.
- Fix pricing section: each page now shows only its assigned CTA (never both).
  13 pages show "Schedule a Demo", 4 pages show "Start Free Trial".
- Remove duplicate Schedule a Demo buttons (e.g. mindbody-activecampaign).
- Create light-mode logo (APIANT-LOGO-V4-Light-Mode.svg) with dark text fill
  for API app pages which have light backgrounds.
- Add .apiant-popup-field-row CSS for two-column form layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ispravi ReferenceError: msgLower mora biti definiran PRIJE gastro pre-gen bloka

msgLower korišten u gastro pre-gen (linija ~360) ali definiran tek u okolica bloku
(linija ~461) — temporal dead zone → ReferenceError → JSON parse error u frontendu.

Fix: premjesti 'const msgLower = message.toLowerCase()' na sam početak
pre-gen sekcije (prije dogadanja bloka), ukloni duplu definiciju u okolica bloku.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Supervisor Sprint 4 — API integration, Bloom's tagging, accessibility, data retention, docs

- Add 8 new API client functions (highlights, predictions, COPPA, rephrase)
- Add credentials: 'include' for httpOnly cookie auth
- Async Bloom's cognitive tagging on session complete (fire-and-forget)
- tagCognitiveData + mapDepthToBloom + thinking momentum update
- 90-day data retention migration (COPPA: redact dialogue content)
- WCAG accessibility fixes across 4 components:
  - BookCard: keyboard-accessible, WCAG AA contrast colors
  - StageProgress: progressbar role, aria-labels
  - AchievementUnlock: Escape key, focus management, reduced-motion
  - NavBar: skip link, mobile touch targets, semantic nav
- README v2.0 with Sprint 1-3 features and score roadmap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: Clarify MCP role in simple flow diagram

Added Claude's decision-making step and MCP validation:
1. User logs in → ID Token
2. Agent exchanges → ID-JAG Token
3. User asks question → Claude
4. Claude decides → 'I need MCP data'
5. Agent calls MCP → Gets NIST data
6. MCP validates ID-JAG → Returns data
7. Claude synthesizes → User sees answer

Makes the AI + MCP interaction clear.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix navigation from Astro landing pages to React app

Issue 1 - Skip React landing page for users from Astro pages:
- Added query parameter detection (?from=landing-page)
- Automatically marks landing page and install prompt as shown
- New users go straight to profile setup
- Cleans up URL after detection

Issue 2 - Prevent dashboard errors for existing users:
- Added redirect check for /protein-tracker and /macro-tracker routes
- When existing users navigate to these static pages, redirect to full page load
- Prevents React SPA state initialization issues

Updated all CTA links in both Astro pages:
- /protein-tracker: 2 CTAs now use /?from=landing-page
- /macro-tracker: 2 CTAs now use /?from=landing-page

This fixes the onboarding flow and prevents dashboard loading errors.

divas.cloud endpoint used by FL/GA. Found via 511pa.com JS bundle
(resources.CameraVideoUrl).

commit.message:
fix: Add relaxed meshQualityControls for snappyHexMesh snap phase

OpenFOAM 13 requires a relaxed sub-dictionary in meshQualityControls
when explicitFeatureSnap is enabled. Without it, snappyHexMesh crashes
with "keyword relaxed is undefined" during the snap phase.

Fix blank hero on reload: cap introGate wait to 600ms

On reload (no loader), GSAP sets hero-headline to opacity:0 immediately,
but introGate was blocked by heroMediaGate (5s timeout) and homeContentGate
(Sanity, potentially slow). The hero stayed invisible for seconds.
Now resolveIntroGate fires within 600ms max on all no-loader paths.

Replace CSS clip-path cursor with Mac-style SVG pointer

Swaps the synthetic clip-path/background cursor div for an inline SVG
using the user-provided Mac cursor artwork (black arrow with white outline).
Adjusts keyframe positions to account for the SVG hotspot offset so the
pointer tip still lands precisely on the Grade This Submission button.

fix: chat delivery, match_start yourSide, chess move format

- Exclude joining player from system chat broadcast so subsequent
  chat messages aren't shadowed by the buffered join notification
- Send per-player match_start with yourSide field so clients know
  which side they're playing (was missing, causing engine AI tests
  to fail since human never sent first move)
- Normalize chess string UCI moves ("e2e4") to { uci: "e2e4" } in
  the move handler for client compatibility
- Fix xiangqi test coordinates: red's cannon is at row 2, not row 7

Ispravi 3 buga: slike caffe barova (placeholder), gastro filter, smještaj showAll SLIKE CAFFE BAROVA — konačni ispravak: - Problem: combo regex (telefoni 04/NNNN) korumpirao URL unutar [[IMG:...]] markera čak i NAKON pomicanja - jer regex radi na tekstu koji sadrži marker - Fix: [[IMG:url]] → privremeni \x02IMG_N\x03 placeholder PRIJE combo regexpa Combo regex ne može pogoditi placeholder, URL ostaje netaknut Nakon combo regexpa: placeholder → GASTRO FILTER — "Gdje ručati" prikazuje samo restorane: - Dodaj wantsDining detekciju: 'ručati','ručak','večerati','večera','jesti'... - Dodaj wantsCafe detekciju: 'kafić','kava','caffe','bar'... - Restorani + brza hrana: prikazuju se kad wantsDining ili opći upit - Caffe barovi: prikazuju se samo kad wantsCafe ili opći upit - Uvod tekst prilagođen namjeri upita SMJEŠTAJ SHOWALL — prikaži sve objekte: - Ukloni && !wantsSobe isključenja iz wantsHotel i wantsApartman - Uvedi typeCount: broj traženih tipova smještaja u upitu - showAll = typeCount === 0 || typeCount >= 2 - Query "Hoteli, apartmani, sobe" → typeCount=3 → showAll=true → svi objekti Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix admin login: establish browser session after magic link auth

Root cause: the implicit-flow callback only sent the token to the Chrome
extension — it never set a browser cookie. The admin page auth check
(createServerClient().auth.getUser()) reads cookies, so it always saw an
unauthenticated user and looped back to sign-in.

Fix — four changes:

1. app/api/auth/set-session/route.ts (NEW)
   POST endpoint that receives { access_token, refresh_token } and calls
   supabase.auth.setSession() via the SSR client, writing auth cookies onto
   the response. The browser applies them, making subsequent server-rendered
   page visits see an authenticated user.

2. app/auth/callback/route.ts
   - Step 2 now POSTs to /api/auth/set-session (credentials: include) before
     doing anything else, so every sign-in flow sets cookies regardless of
     whether the extension is present.
   - Reads ?next= query param; if present, redirects there after auth (e.g.
     back to /admin). Falls back to /dashboard if no next and no extension.
   - Fixes misleading copy: 'Activating Katana in your browser…' → 'Verifying
     your sign-in link…'

3. app/auth/signin/page.tsx
   - Reads ?next= param and passes it in emailRedirectTo so the magic link
     carries the destination through: /auth/callback?next=/admin#access_token=…
   - Fixes sent-state copy: removes 'the Katana extension activates
     automatically' (wrong for web-only sign-ins like admin login).

4. app/admin/page.tsx
   - redirect('/auth/signin') → redirect('/auth/signin?next=/admin') so the
     full round-trip lands back on the admin page after sign-in.

commit.message:
fix: split nav backdrop + content into separate DOM siblings to fix iOS blur

Previous approach (backdrop as child div) still caused iOS WebKit to promote
the parent to a compositing layer, leaking blur onto icon rendering.
Separate sibling elements share no compositing context — blur cannot bleed.
